# Centre of the CT volume in DICOM coordinates. TsDicomPatient redefines these itself,
# but only while reading the image, which is after it has calculated the initial patient
# placement from Ge/Patient/Trans*. TOPAS recalculates the placement before the first run,
# so these values do not affect the tracking geometry -- but the geometry overlap check
# runs on the initial placement. Left at 0 the patient is checked at -IsoCenter instead of
# CTcentre - IsoCenter, which aborts TOPAS on a spurious overlap for a long CT (issue #61).

# ---------- Native ProtonLET (depth): dose- and track-averaged ----------
# TOPAS's native ProtonLET with DEFAULT settings, so we can see how the native
# scorer behaves. WeightBy selects dose- (DLET) vs fluence/track-averaged (TLET).
# CAVEAT: by default it looks up LET at each step's INITIAL energy
# (UsePreStepLookup), so it is biased where dE/dx changes fast (distal edge). The
# corrected/averaged, particle-filtered, LET-to-water version is issue #153.
s:Sc/dDLET_p/Quantity = "ProtonLET"
s:Sc/dDLET_p/Component = "ScoringZBox"
s:Sc/dDLET_p/OutputType = "csv"
s:Sc/dDLET_p/IfOutputFileAlreadyExists = "Overwrite"
b:Sc/dDLET_p/PropagateToChildren = "True"
s:Sc/dDLET_p/WeightBy = "dose"
s:Sc/dDLET_p/OutputFile = outdir + "depth_Z.DLET.protons.mat"

s:Sc/tTLET_prim/IfOutputFileAlreadyExists = "Overwrite"
s:Sc/tTLET_prim/WeightBy = "fluence"
s:Sc/tTLET_prim/OnlyIncludeParticlesOfGeneration = "Primary"
s:Sc/tTLET_prim/OutputFile = outdir + "target.TLET.primary.mat"

# ---------- Target differential fluence spectra vs ENUC ----------
# TOPAS bins PreStep total kinetic energy. For species with mass number A,
# postprocess maps E_total/A onto the shared SH12A ENUC grid (0.1..300 MeV/u)
# and sums the species spectra to produce the all-particles page.
s:Sc/sp_p/Quantity = "Fluence"
s:Sc/sp_p/Component = "TargetBox"
s:Sc/sp_p/OutputType = "csv"
s:Sc/sp_p/IfOutputFileAlreadyExists = "Overwrite"
i:Sc/sp_p/EBins = 150
d:Sc/sp_p/EBinMin = 0.1 MeV
d:Sc/sp_p/EBinMax = 300. MeV
sc:Sc/sp_p/EBinEnergy = "PreStep"
sv:Sc/sp_p/OnlyIncludeParticlesNamed = 1 "proton"
s:Sc/sp_p/OutputFile = outdir + "spectrum_target.FLUENCE.protons.mat.vs_ENUC"

s:Sc/sp_d/Quantity = "Fluence"
s:Sc/sp_d/Component = "TargetBox"
s:Sc/sp_d/OutputType = "csv"
s:Sc/sp_d/IfOutputFileAlreadyExists = "Overwrite"
i:Sc/sp_d/EBins = 150
d:Sc/sp_d/EBinMin = 0.2 MeV
d:Sc/sp_d/EBinMax = 600. MeV
sc:Sc/sp_d/EBinEnergy = "PreStep"
sv:Sc/sp_d/OnlyIncludeParticlesNamed = 1 "deuteron"
s:Sc/sp_d/OutputFile = outdir + "spectrum_target.FLUENCE.deuterons.mat.vs_ENUC"

s:Sc/sp_t/Quantity = "Fluence"
s:Sc/sp_t/Component = "TargetBox"
s:Sc/sp_t/OutputType = "csv"
s:Sc/sp_t/IfOutputFileAlreadyExists = "Overwrite"
i:Sc/sp_t/EBins = 150
d:Sc/sp_t/EBinMin = 0.3 MeV
d:Sc/sp_t/EBinMax = 900. MeV
sc:Sc/sp_t/EBinEnergy = "PreStep"
sv:Sc/sp_t/OnlyIncludeParticlesNamed = 1 "triton"
s:Sc/sp_t/OutputFile = outdir + "spectrum_target.FLUENCE.tritons.mat.vs_ENUC"

s:Sc/sp_he3/Quantity = "Fluence"
s:Sc/sp_he3/Component = "TargetBox"
s:Sc/sp_he3/OutputType = "csv"
s:Sc/sp_he3/IfOutputFileAlreadyExists = "Overwrite"
i:Sc/sp_he3/EBins = 150
d:Sc/sp_he3/EBinMin = 0.3 MeV
d:Sc/sp_he3/EBinMax = 900. MeV
sc:Sc/sp_he3/EBinEnergy = "PreStep"
sv:Sc/sp_he3/OnlyIncludeParticlesNamed = 1 "He3"
s:Sc/sp_he3/OutputFile = outdir + "spectrum_target.FLUENCE.he3.mat.vs_ENUC"

s:Sc/sp_a/Quantity = "Fluence"
s:Sc/sp_a/Component = "TargetBox"
s:Sc/sp_a/OutputType = "csv"
s:Sc/sp_a/IfOutputFileAlreadyExists = "Overwrite"
i:Sc/sp_a/EBins = 150
d:Sc/sp_a/EBinMin = 0.4 MeV
d:Sc/sp_a/EBinMax = 1200. MeV
sc:Sc/sp_a/EBinEnergy = "PreStep"
sv:Sc/sp_a/OnlyIncludeParticlesNamed = 1 "alpha"
s:Sc/sp_a/OutputFile = outdir + "spectrum_target.FLUENCE.alphas.mat.vs_ENUC"
